overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex at night. The environment features stone columns, sphinx statues, torch-lit corridors, and grand architectural elements under a moonlit sky.

agents.ego_description: walking through the moonlit temple garden, passing stone columns and lattice walls

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone pillar with ornate capital
tall dark green coniferous tree silhouetted against the sky
decorative stone screen wall with geometric diamond pattern
large dark urn-shaped planter with red flowers
wall-mounted iron bracket with burning flame
bright full moon in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a serene temple garden courtyard at night. Stone columns line the left side while decorative lattice walls and planters occupy the right. The scene is illuminated by moonlight and scattered torch sconces, with tall cypress trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade transitioning to open courtyard

events.description: entering a covered stone colonnade with overhead roofing
exiting the covered walkway into open moonlit space
large sphinx statue on pedestal comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: passing through the covered corridor and emerging into an open area with a sphinx statue

entered.detail: roofed walkway supported by massive stone columns
large stone sphinx sculpture resting on a rectangular pedestal
tall solid stone barrier with decorative top
tall palm tree with spreading fronds

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered colonnade with stone walls, then emerges into an open courtyard where a large sphinx statue on a pedestal dominates the right side. The lighting shifts from torch-lit shadows to open moonlight as the garden elements fade from view.

events.description: two NPC pedestrians come into view walking across the plaza
slight turn toward the grand temple entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the temple complex, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: civilian in dark robes walking across the plaza from left to right
civilian in red tunic walking toward the right side of the frame

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk with pointed top rising above the palm trees
massive temple facade with triangular pediment and columns
large stone sphinx flanking the left side of the entrance
large stone sphinx flanking the right side of the entrance
white fabric banners hanging between the entrance columns

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast ceremonial plaza with an obelisk visible in the distance. Two NPCs walk across the open space as the character approaches a grand temple entrance flanked by massive sphinx statues and draped with white fabric banners. The ground features ornate mosaic tiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand colonnade entrance with sphinx guardians

events.description: approaching the grand temple entrance with flanking sphinx statues
entering the covered colonnade, torchlight becomes the primary illumination

agents.ego_description: walking under the draped canopy and entering the columned temple interior

entered.detail: long corridor with repeating stone columns and overhead covering
decorated stone pillars with carved capitals supporting the entrance
red glowing lanterns suspended from the colonnade ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing temple entrance guarded by two massive sphinx statues. Passing under the draped fabric canopy, the scene transitions into a long colonnade illuminated by hanging red lanterns. The open plaza and obelisk fade from view as the character enters the sheltered temple interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene temple garden into the imposing, lantern-lit interior of a grand Egyptian sanctuary. It begins in a moonlit courtyard lined with stone columns and decorative lattice walls, moving past tall cypress trees and torch-lit sconces. As the camera passes through a covered colonnade, the scene opens into a wider courtyard dominated by a large sphinx statue on a pedestal. The view then expands across a vast ceremonial plaza with ornate mosaic tiling and a distant obelisk before approaching a grand entrance flanked by massive sphinxes and white fabric banners. Finally, the camera passes under the draped canopy, transitioning from the open moonlit plaza into a long, sheltered colonnade illuminated by hanging red lanterns.
